title: ophrys × capellae-pacis
intro: Ophrys × capellae-pacis, also known as the orchid bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that is a cross between Ophrys sphegodes and Ophrys tenthredifolia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ophrys × capellae-pacis include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
